case_title: ABOLFATHIPOUR, SAFAR vs. JOHNSON, VONCEAL et al

docket_entries.description: AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, ENTER JUDGMENT ON FEB-23-1998
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, VONCEAL NATIONAL CAR RENTAL SYSTEMS, INC.
REQUEST FOR TRIAL DE NOVO FILED AFTER ARBITRATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABOLFATHIPOUR, SAFAR

JUDGE JOSEPH A. DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 09:20AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. JEFFREY ALLEN FOR THE DEFT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLTF. DEFT MAKES A MOTION TO DISMISS AND JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFT. COURT GRANTS MOTION. DEFT TO PREPARE ANY AND ALL DOCUMENTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, VONCEAL NATIONAL CAR RENTAL SYSTEMS, INC. ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $593.13 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $593.13, THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE PLTF'S ACTION WITH PREJUDICE AND THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED AGAINST PLTF IN FAVOR OF THE DEFTS.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER GRANTING DEFT'S MOTION TO DISMISS AND ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AGAINST PLTF & IN FAVOR OF DEFTS. FILED BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, VONCEAL NATIONAL CAR RENTAL SYSTEMS, INC.
